summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of major homepage redesign and new industry pages. All features working correctly including hero animation, trust badges, section reordering, industry pages with unique content, form submissions, and dynamic title tags.
passed_tests: Homepage hero shows 'Your Business Runs on Technology.' with rotating word animation working correctly
Homepage hero displays all 4 trust badges: SOC 2 Compliant, CMMC Registered, 24/7 AI Monitoring, CRN MSP 500
Navigation shows AI link before Industries link (correct order)
Homepage section order: AI Service appears before Industries section
Industries section cards have working 'Learn more' links for Construction, Financial Services, and Manufacturing
Financial Services industry page renders with correct headline and $4.9M stat
Construction industry page renders with correct headline and 41% stat
Manufacturing industry page renders with correct headline and #1 stat
Each industry page shows 4 unique challenge cards
Each industry page shows compliance frameworks and software tags
Industry page form submission shows success state correctly
Industry pages have correct dynamic title tags (e.g. 'Financial Services IT & Cybersecurity | Veracity Technologies')
City pages have correct dynamic title tags (e.g. 'IT Support in Minneapolis, MN | Veracity Technologies')
Homepage works correctly with all sections rendering without errors
